creator: beckman@angryox.com
text:
I was able to get it working... here's a diff.  They fixed the
parenthesis stuff, so I removed the patch file.

diff -u sox-14.1.0/Makefile sox/Makefile
--- sox-14.1.0/Makefile Wed Sep 24 12:12:25 2008
+++ sox/Makefile        Thu Nov 13 19:16:30 2008
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      sox
-PORTVERSION=   14.1.0
+PORTVERSION=   14.2.0
 CATEGORIES=    audio
 MASTER_SITES=  SF

diff -u sox-14.1.0/distinfo sox/distinfo
--- sox-14.1.0/distinfo Wed Sep 24 12:12:25 2008
+++ sox/distinfo        Thu Nov 13 19:18:36 2008
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (sox-14.1.0.tar.gz) = b8e2cb3d615d3830347a0948dd8b74a8
-SHA256 (sox-14.1.0.tar.gz) =
319cf07ee06fcbfbcaced7307e23ca567739c278f76bc143a9258a9a23e42101
-SIZE (sox-14.1.0.tar.gz) = 912057
+MD5 (sox-14.2.0.tar.gz) = 7afc0e85d14be014f08e7d3b7ee8c24e
+SHA256 (sox-14.2.0.tar.gz) =
8d1b8eb33a72a181369475c9da5fdcbe5f6820e6af3d86a0e84f6939e61a9dc1
+SIZE (sox-14.2.0.tar.gz) = 964800
Common subdirectories: sox-14.1.0/files and sox/files

-- 
I am Beckman.
